title: Checkpoint Manager for Claude Code
detailMarkdown:
# Checkpoint Manager for Claude Code
Manage Claude Code checkpoints to safely rewind code changes, restore conversation states, and explore alternatives without fear using ESC+ESC or /rewind commands
**Category:** commands
**Author:** JSONbored
**Tags:** `checkpoints` `rewind` `undo` `version-control` `session-recovery` `safety`

## Install
```bash
/checkpoint-manager [action] [options]
```

## Usage
/checkpoint-manager [action] [options]

## Links
- https://heyclau.de/commands/checkpoint-manager
- https://docs.claude.com/en/docs/claude-code/checkpointing
